channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: One day after a scary on-set incident where an intruder conf…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
One day after a scary on-set incident where an intruder confronted Craig Melvin, the 'Today' co-host addressed the situation on Friday morning’s episode.

Watch/Read ↓
item.content:encoded:
One day after a scary on-set incident where an intruder confronted Craig Melvin, the 'Today' co-host addressed the situation on Friday morning’s episode.

Watch/Read ↓

item.title: IFULKI’s debut single is a collage of ominous trip-hop textu…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: IFULKI’s debut single is a collage of ominous trip-hop textures, soulful piano embellishments, anxious percussion, and soaring vocals

item.title: The military said Friday it used intelligence sources to tar…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The military said Friday it used intelligence sources to target militants over the previous 24 hours. The operations were in response to attacks by militants earlier in the week. n.pr/4vvLEZX
item.content:encoded: The military said Friday it used intelligence sources to target militants over the previous 24 hours. The operations were in response to attacks by militants earlier in the week. n.pr/4vvLEZX

item.title: Might the Stones pull a Harry Styles and block-book Madison …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Might the Stones pull a Harry Styles and block-book Madison Square Garden?

Could they hit three or four big stadiums?

What about a single blowout gig to wrap it all up?

There are many ways this could play out. Here are some scenarios: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Might the Stones pull a Harry Styles and block-book Madison Square Garden?

Could they hit three or four big stadiums?

What about a single blowout gig to wrap it all up?

There are many ways this could play out. Here are some scenarios: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japane…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japanese Emperor. But the country's first female prime minister opposes it. n.pr/4wTpGkR
item.content:encoded: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japanese Emperor. But the country's first female prime minister opposes it. n.pr/4wTpGkR

item.title: In its depiction of the fall of Troy — and its lingering aft…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
In its depiction of the fall of Troy — and its lingering aftermath — Christopher Nolan's 'Odyssey' sends a clear message about the terrible costs of war.

Commentary: www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv...
item.content:encoded:

item.title: In Jem Calder's debut novel, the characters have boarded a p…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In Jem Calder's debut novel, the characters have boarded a plane, baggage first -- with no idea where it will land. Will it lead to an actual relationship, nevermind happiness? n.pr/4aU5xTg
item.content:encoded: In Jem Calder's debut novel, the characters have boarded a plane, baggage first -- with no idea where it will land. Will it lead to an actual relationship, nevermind happiness? n.pr/4aU5xTg

item.title: President Trump gave a primetime speech raising claims of vo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump gave a primetime speech raising claims of voting vulnerabilities but offered no new evidence. And, at least 2 people have died in major flooding in Texas. n.pr/4fg0BJC
item.content:encoded: President Trump gave a primetime speech raising claims of voting vulnerabilities but offered no new evidence. And, at least 2 people have died in major flooding in Texas. n.pr/4fg0BJC

#幽獄パレード
item.content:encoded:
“ロック×ゴースト”コンセプトのアイドル・幽獄パレード、10月に初のシングル発売（コメントあり）
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681194?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social
